title: puccinellia kuenlunica
intro: Puccinellia kuenlunica, also known as Kuenlun fescue, is a type of plant species in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Puccinellia kuenlunica is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or made into a poultice for topical application, with its health benefits being attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids.
